title: Part 5 – Phrases à compléter : ressources humaines
instructions: Choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui complète correctement chaque phrase.

questions.sentence: All new employees ____ to complete an orientation program during their first week.
questions.explanation: "Employees" est pluriel, il faut donc l'accord au pluriel : "are required".

questions.sentence: Ms. Alvarez will retire ____ the end of this fiscal year.
The HR department is responsible ____ processing all employment contracts.
Employees who wish to apply for the position ____ submit their resume by Friday.
questions.explanation: "Must" est un modal : il ne prend jamais de -s et n'est jamais suivi de "to".

questions.sentence: The new policy applies to ____ employees, regardless of department.
questions.explanation: "All" + nom pluriel ("all employees"). "Every" exigerait un nom au singulier ("every employee").
